testcase.name: testSubtract_2Feet_Minus1Foot_Returns1Foot

testcase.name: testGetErrorHistory_AfterErrorOperation_ReturnsError
testcase.system-out: 10:58:52.658 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-3] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /add called 10:58:52.659 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-3] ERROR c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- Add failed: add Error: Cannot perform arithmetic between different measurement categories: LengthUnit and WeightUnit 10:58:52.695 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-2] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- GET /history/errored

testcase.name: testCompare_NotEqualQuantities_ReturnsFalse
testcase.system-out: 10:58:52.812 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-4] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /compare called 10:58:52.819 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-4] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- compare: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) == QuantityDTO(value=10.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) -> false

testcase.name: testCompare_EqualQuantities_ReturnsTrue
testcase.system-out: 10:58:52.872 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-6] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /compare called 10:58:52.876 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-6] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- compare: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) == QuantityDTO(value=12.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) -> true

testcase.name: testGetHistoryByOperation_AfterCompare_ReturnsRecord
testcase.system-out: 10:58:52.983 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-5] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /compare called 10:58:52.989 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-5] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- compare: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) == QuantityDTO(value=12.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) -> true 10:58:53.006 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-7] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- GET /history/operation/compare

testcase.name: testCompare_DifferentTypes_Returns400
testcase.system-out: 10:58:53.074 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-8] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /compare called 10:58:53.075 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-8] ERROR c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- Compare failed: compare Error: Cannot compare different measurement categories: LengthUnit and WeightUnit

testcase.name: testDivide_2Feet_By1Foot_Returns2
testcase.system-out: 10:58:53.106 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-9] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /divide called 10:58:53.111 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-9] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- divide: QuantityDTO(value=2.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) / QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) = 2.0

testcase.name: testConvert_KilogramToGram_Returns1000
testcase.system-out: 10:58:53.152 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-10] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /convert called 10:58:53.156 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-10] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- convert: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=KILOGRAM, measurementType=WeightUnit) -> GRAM = 1000.0

testcase.name: testAdd_DifferentTypes_Returns400
testcase.system-out: 10:58:53.199 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-1] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /add called 10:58:53.199 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-1] ERROR c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- Add failed: add Error: Cannot perform arithmetic between different measurement categories: LengthUnit and WeightUnit

testcase.name: testGetHistoryByType_LengthUnit_ReturnsAllLengthRecords
testcase.system-out: 10:58:53.239 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-3] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /compare called 10:58:53.242 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-3] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- compare: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) == QuantityDTO(value=12.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) -> true 10:58:53.259 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-2] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /add called 10:58:53.263 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-2] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- add: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) + QuantityDTO(value=12.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) = 2.0 10:58:53.275 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-4] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- GET /history/type/LengthUnit

testcase.name: testConvert_FeetToInches_Returns12
testcase.system-out: 10:58:53.385 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-5] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /convert called 10:58:53.388 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-5] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- convert: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) -> INCH = 12.0

testcase.name: testAdd_FeetAndInches_Returns2Feet
testcase.system-out: 10:58:53.415 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-7] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /add called 10:58:53.419 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-7] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- add: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) + QuantityDTO(value=12.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) = 2.0

testcase.name: testDivide_ByZero_Returns400
testcase.system-out: 10:58:53.463 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-8] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /divide called 10:58:53.464 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-8] ERROR c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- Divide unexpected error: Division by zero

testcase.name: testGetOperationCount_AfterMultipleCompares
testcase.system-out: 10:58:53.558 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-10] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /compare called 10:58:53.562 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-10] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- compare: QuantityDTO(value=1.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) == QuantityDTO(value=12.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) -> true 10:58:53.589 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-1] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- POST /compare called 10:58:53.593 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-1] INFO c.a.q.s.QuantityMeasurementServiceImpl -- compare: QuantityDTO(value=2.0, unit=FEET, measurementType=LengthUnit) == QuantityDTO(value=24.0, unit=INCH, measurementType=LengthUnit) -> true 10:58:53.604 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-3] INFO c.a.q.c.QuantityMeasurementController -- GET /count/compare
